mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cat_process_gateway_condition (process_definition_id, version, sequence_flow_id, source_node_id, target_node_id, condition_type, is_default, native_expression, create_by, create_time) SELECT process_definition_id, #{targetVersion}, sequence_flow_id, source_node_id, target_node_id, condition_type, is_default, native_expression, create_by, NOW() FROM cat_process_gateway_condition WHERE process_definition_id = #{processDefinitionId} AND version = #{sourceVersion}
